task: Track the details of order 12345 with email 12345@gmail.com. My last name is Johnson.
graderReasoning: The agent navigated to Michaels' official order tracking page (https://www.michaels.com/track-my-order), entered the provided order number 12345, last name Johnson, and email 12345@gmail.com into the 'Track Order by Order Number' form, and submitted it. The resulting page explicitly showed 'Not found' and 'Please search for another order number,' which is a valid completion because the site itself reported no matching order.
final_result_response:
I checked Michaels order tracking with:

- Order number: 12345
- Last name: Johnson
- Email: 12345@gmail.com

Result: Michaels says “Not found” and asks to search for another order number.
action_history: Opening Michaels order tracking: const m1 = await openTab('https://www.michaels.com/');
Looking for order tracking options: await page.locator('e2').click();
Opening Track My Orders: await page.locator('e238').click();
Submitting order tracking details: await page.locator('e49').fill('12345');
Submitting order tracking details: await page.locator('e50').fill('Johnson');
Submitting order tracking details: await page.locator('e52').click();
